# X-Act Plumbing LLC

> Licensed master plumber serving Red Oak, Waxahachie, Ferris, and Kaufman TX. Family-owned, 14+ years experience, 24/7 emergency service. Phone: (469) 505-8362. Not a franchise — a local company with deep Ellis County roots.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/): Overview of services, credentials, and customer reviews for X-Act Plumbing LLC in Red Oak, TX.
- [About](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/about): Background on founder Daniel Clayburn — Red Oak native, licensed master plumber, 14+ years of residential and commercial plumbing experience.
- [Services](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services): Full index of plumbing services offered by X-Act Plumbing LLC.
- [Contact](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/contact): Contact form, phone number, and service area details.
- [Locations](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/locations): Service area hub listing all cities served by X-Act Plumbing.

## Services

- [Emergency Plumbing](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/emergency-plumbing): 24/7 emergency plumbers in Red Oak and Waxahachie TX — slab leaks, burst pipes, water heater failure.
- [Water Heater Services](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/water-heater): Tank and tankless water heater installation, replacement, and emergency repair in Red Oak TX.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/drain-cleaning): Hydro-jetting, camera inspection, and preventative drain maintenance across North Texas.
- [Leak Detection](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/leak-detection): Non-invasive slab and underground leak detection with repair and re-pipe services.
- [Remodels](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/remodels): Plumbing upgrades for kitchen, bathroom, and outdoor remodel projects in Red Oak and Waxahachie TX.
- [Commercial New Builds](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/services/commercial-new-builds): Rough-in and top-out plumbing for new commercial construction in Ellis County TX.

## Service Areas

- [Red Oak TX](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/locations/red-oak-tx): Plumber in Red Oak, TX 75154 — X-Act Plumbing's home base and primary service area.
- [Waxahachie TX](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/locations/waxahachie-tx): Plumber in Waxahachie, TX 75165 — full plumbing services for Ellis County's largest city.
- [Ferris TX](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/locations/ferris-tx): Plumber in Ferris, TX 75125 — residential and commercial plumbing service.
- [Kaufman TX](https://www.x-actplumbing.com/locations/kaufman-tx): Plumber in Kaufman, TX 75152 — serving Kaufman County homeowners and businesses.
